summary: Completed comprehensive testing of V5 features: Bond Analytics API, Auto-Execute frontend, backend refactoring verification. All 10 requested test scenarios passed. Backend: 15/15 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features working correctly.

minor.issue: Fixed - positions stored as list instead of dict caused 500 error. Updated paper_trading.py to handle both formats.

issues: WebSocket error appears in console on initial connection - cosmetic only, reconnects successfully

passed_tests: 1. Login flow - admin@trading.com / Admin@123456 successfully logs in and redirects to dashboard
2. Bond Analytics panel on Dashboard - 4 metric cards (Curve Slope, VIX, DXY, Real Yield) and signal badges visible
3. Bond Analytics API - GET /api/market/bond-analytics returns yield_curve, risk_metrics, inflation, signals
4. Marketplace page - 4 tabs present: Browse, Subscriptions, My Strategies, Auto-Execute
5. Auto-Execute tab in Marketplace - 'Active Auto-Execute Strategies' and 'Execution History' sections present
6. Settings > Security tab - 2FA setup UI works with 'Enable Two-Factor Authentication' button
7. Settings > Alerts tab - Push Notifications toggle present under 'Browser Push Notifications' section
8. Social page - Accessible via Dashboard dropdown 'Trading Community', has Leaderboard/Activity/Network tabs
9. Health endpoint - GET /api/health returns features list including bond_analytics, auto_execute

10. Backend refactoring verification - All existing APIs still work: /api/auth/login, /api/market/current, /api/strategy/config, /api/paper-trading/portfolio, /api/backtest/run, /api/social/leaderboard
critical_code_review_comments: Backend refactoring from monolithic 3390-line server.py to modular structure is clean and well-organized
Bond Analytics service correctly fetches Yahoo Finance data for 7 tickers and computes derived metrics
Auto-Execute feature has proper UI with active strategies list and execution history logs
All existing APIs maintained backward compatibility after refactoring
context_for_next_testing_agent: V5 features fully tested and working: (1) Bond Analytics API returns yield_curve (slope_10y_3m, is_inverted), risk_metrics (vix, dollar_index), inflation (real_yield, breakeven_inflation), and signals. Dashboard shows these in BOND ANALYTICS panel with 4 metric cards and signal badges. (2) Marketplace has 4 tabs including Auto-Execute tab showing active auto-execute strategies and execution history. (3) Backend refactored from monolithic server.py to modular structure with config.py, models/schemas.py, and 8 service files - all APIs maintained backward compatibility. (4) Fixed paper_trading.py to handle both list and dict formats for positions data. WebSocket broadcasts BOND_ANALYTICS data periodically.
